tasks.title: Workflow Reconciliation And Consistency Follow-up
scope: Record T006 attempt 1 review_rejected honestly before code edits.
Fix rollback/finalizer behavior so failed rollback requests cannot later finalize and delete active users.
Fix account deletion finalizer cleanup so post comment history subcollections are deleted like event comment history.
Run required local verification without commit, stage, push, PR, deploy, or unit-test/TDD expansion.
nonScope: No commit, stage, push, PR, CI watch, merge, local main sync, deploy, or production rules/functions deployment.
No unit tests or TDD for v1 unless explicitly reauthorized after BLOCKED.
No broad account deletion redesign or unrelated cleanup.
engineerInstructions: Attempt 2 starts from Reviewer rejection; do not revert unrelated worktree changes.
Keep fixes minimal and inside owned files.
Do not record review_passed or completed without Reviewer decision.
Report command exit codes and residual risks.
acceptanceCriteria: AC-T006.2.1: Attempt 1 review_rejected and attempt 2 state are recorded in tasks.md, status.json, and handoff.md before code edits.
AC-T006.2.2: Side-effect rollback prevents failed requests from being selected or finalized later.
AC-T006.2.3: Account deletion cleanup deletes post comment history subcollections before deleting post comments.
AC-T006.2.4: Required local verification is rerun within the authorization boundary.

lastRun.summary: Changed files linted successfully; React settings warning only.

verification.expectedSignal: exit 0 with no changed-file type errors

lastRun.summary: Changed-file type check reported no errors.
9 status files valid and synced after attempt 2 evidence write.

evidence.engineerReport: Attempt 2 recorded T006 attempt 1 review_rejected first, then fixed both Reviewer-blocking defects. Rollback now removes scheduledFor, sets finalizationBlocked=true and failureStage=request_side_effects, and finalizer eligibility requires pending/finalizing or failed with finalizeStartedAt and no finalizationBlocked marker. Finalizer failed retries remain possible only for failures that reached finalization. Post deletion now uses the same comments-with-history cleanup helper as event deletion in both repo/server and functions/index.js.
evidence.reviewerReport: review_passed: T006 attempt 2 resolves the prior rollback/finalizer eligibility bug and post comment history cleanup gap. Workflow state records attempt 1 rejection and attempt 2 engineer_done without fake PASS/completed state. Fresh lint, changed-file type check, workflow check, and syntax checks passed.
commandOutputSummary: npm run lint:changed: exit 0; React settings warning only.
npm run type-check:changed: exit 0; No type errors in changed files.
npm run workflow:check: exit 0; 9 status files valid and synced after attempt 2 evidence write.
changedFilesSummary: src/repo/server/account-deletion-server-repo.js: rollback request no longer remains due/finalizable; finalizer skips non-finalizable failed requests; post comments delete history subcollections.
functions/index.js: finalizer mirrors non-finalizable failed-request guard and post comment history cleanup.
specs/account-deletion/status.json: T006 attempt 1 rejection and attempt 2 engineer_done evidence recorded.
specs/account-deletion/tasks.md: T006 attempt 2 task contract and verification evidence recorded.
specs/account-deletion/handoff.md: attempt 2 changes and residual state recorded.
